feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: To my Frens #52
entry.content: Golden pleats and crispy bottoms, Sizzling in the pan, Stuffed with veggies, silk tofu, Catch me if you can! Drizzled thick with oyster sauce, Savory and sweet, A perfectly delicious, Unshareable little treat. I see you looking hungry, But I'm drawing a hard line, Sorry, my dear friends, Every single bite is mine!

entry.title: /b/ Random: Had to put down one of my cats tonight. Older boy named Bear Was pretty sudden b…
entry.content: Had to put down one of my cats tonight. Older boy named Bear Was pretty sudden but not unexpected. He was old. Friendliest kitty I’ve ever met. I loved him so much and I miss him already. He died as I laid by his side and looked him in his eyes and I felt his heart stop. Bye little Bear Bear, I hope maybe someday we can see each other again.

entry.title: /g/ Technology: the 15th chat standard
entry.content: i will achieve the 15th standard GET as prophesied by xkcd One thing that I have thought of is "abandon XMPP, Mumble, and IRC, and create a God protocol that takes the best elements from all three of those protocols and implement what they are all collectively missing" I could perhaps easily establish bridges to other protocols and create compatibility layers that would allow clients designed for the other protocols to connect to the God protocol simply through network layer shims, meaning no tr

entry.title: /int/ International: The shithole France has over 35,000 municipalities (the same number than the USA…
entry.content: The shithole France has over 35,000 municipalities (the same number than the USA, a country the size of a continent). Many of them cover barely 2 square miles. I’m not even kidding. Most mayors have egos far too big to even consider merging with neighboring towns. Endless bureaucracy and a bloated public sector, are exactly what’s dragging France down. Just imagine the amount of money wasted on all these people who produce nothing and are simply a burden on the rest of us.

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Future computer architecture
entry.content: I kind of expect that for most people(average gamers, photoshop users, even those who want to run small models on their PCs) we will switch to unified memory setups. Granted I expect that on PC, memory will still be modular using CAMM2 modules. Dedicated GPUs will move to the realm of high end enthusiasts/enterprise. Does this mean no GPU for you? No, I expect consumer motherboards to still include PCi-E. It's cheap and an open standard after all, I just don't expect most people will need a dedi

entry.title: /g/ Technology: How do I force myself to stop caring and just complete a project? First off ther…
entry.content: How do I force myself to stop caring and just complete a project? First off there is code quality >tell Big Pickle to write js >it works, but it's written poorly >arrow functions everywhere >everything in one js file >bad variable names >not DRY enough Then there is the scope creep >image search using hashes >oh how about a color filter >oh how about a nsfw filter >width, height, file size Then there are performance optimizations >0.5s queries? I want millisecond queries >render time is 0.5s? I

entry.title: /g/ Technology: TLP Gratitude Thread
entry.content: Let us all give thanks to linrunner for the gift he has bestowed upon us and so graciously maintains after all of these years: TLP. Truly, there is no better utility known to man for squeezing every last drop of performance and power out of business-grade laptops. From the bottoms of my aging Dell, Lenovo, and HP lappies, thank you! Anons, find YOUR way to give thanks here: https://linrunner.de/tlp/contribute .html Now, let us each share the modified lines from a TLP conf file that has benefited

entry.content: /flg/ - F-List General #8360 Sleeping, Leave Love Edition Previous Thread: >>83927137 F-list is a website for people interested in erotic roleplaying, and creating character profiles to find like-minded partners with similar interests and fetishes to roleplay with. It features a webchat (which can be used for textual roleplaying), group forums and more kinks and depravity than you can memorize. The purpose of this thread is to serve as a place where roleplayers can freely share and advertise the

entry.title: /news/ News: Mamdani more popular than Netanyahu among U.S. Jews, new poll shows
entry.content: The Associated Press survey found growing dissatisfaction with Israel’s wartime leadership, even as the New York mayor remains divisive over his views on Israel https://forward.com/news/836468/mam dani-netanyahu-american-jews-poll/ New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani, whose outspoken criticism of Israel has made him a frequent target of Jewish and pro-Israel advocates, is viewed more favorably by American Jews than Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu, according to a new poll released Tuesda

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Andrew Scott Sparks Early Oscar Buzz for ELSINORE
entry.content: >According to The Playlist’s Gregory Ellwood, “Elsinore,” directed by Simon Stone, is emerging as a potential fall awards-season contender. The StudioCanal-backed drama stars Andrew Scott as acclaimed British actor Ian Charleson (“Chariots of Fire”), focusing on the final years of Charleson’s life and his celebrated 1989 stage performance in “Hamlet” while seriously ill with AIDS. >According to sources, the film has generated exceptional buzz, getting into every festival to which it has been sub

entry.title: /b/ Random: your thoughts about things dont matter toughts usually are bullshit, you are not…
entry.content: your thoughts about things dont matter toughts usually are bullshit, you are not your thoughts, you have to transend the schizophrenia of you believing your story or the story of others, grow up , mind max, how many hours have you meditated, how many hours have you spent analyzing your own mind and trying to stop the bullshit of your thoughts about things the first step to becoming mind maxxed is by begining to be a better person, you do this by doing good deeds with mindfulness and detachment,

entry.title: /int/ International: Figuring out the size of US cities is actually not that simple, due to the spraw…
entry.content: Figuring out the size of US cities is actually not that simple, due to the sprawl. Official city populations are worthless, since city limits almost never correspond to the actual limits of the urban area. US Census numbers are often worthless because they are based on counties rather than urban area. You have to combine several methods to get a reasonable estimate. Here is a reasonable estimate for what the biggest urban areas actually are: >1. New York City region (New York, New Jersey, Connec

entry.title: /int/ International: Vent thread
entry.content: I will never be a woman. It doesn't matter how many surgeries or HRT I go through, it will never change my sex, and it will always be unnatural. I will always just be trapped in a moid XY body, and no amount of genital mutilation or hormonal mutilation will cover up that fact. There's not a single point on this planet to even do DIY HRT, because I don't want to pretend that I'm not a moid at the end of the day. That's just the way it is. Some things will never change.

entry.title: /o/ Auto: Haven't had my car professionally serviced in a while. Just doing oil changes my…
entry.content: Haven't had my car professionally serviced in a while. Just doing oil changes myself but thought I'd take it in just for an overall safety check and hopeful coolant flush and change. He claims that there are some coolant leaks and doesn't recommend the flush as the hoses are old and might cause more harm than good apparently radiator not being in the best condition. Also said rocker cover is leaking or something. And brakes worn down. How serious can these be and how soon should I address it. Wi

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Why can't the GrapheneOS devs figure out how to make CashApp work on their rom?

entry.title: /g/ Technology: I know the difference between them, I'm just curious to know which one you guys …
entry.content: I know the difference between them, I'm just curious to know which one you guys choose depending on the activities you're performing. For example, will a guy living in China wanting to access a site forbidden by the government (for example, Facebook) use VPN or TOR? And someone wanting to download some free programming books? You got the idea.

entry.title: /o/ Auto: Can you disable the "driver attention" camera in hands free driving cars but sti…
entry.content: Can you disable the "driver attention" camera in hands free driving cars but still make the auto-driving work without you having to look straight ahead 100% of the time? My car has hands free but just a torque sensor in the wheel and no camera, but I figure any future car will have a camera and a nanny system, can this be defeated?

entry.title: /news/ News: ICE shoots immigrant
entry.content: https://www.khou.com/article/news/l ocal/houston-deadly-ice-agent-shoot ing/285-e7f8edab-ef71-4de3-a748-933 bc6308453 HOUSTON — A man was shot and killed Tuesday morning by federal agents in Houston's East End, according to United States Immigration and Customs Enforcement officials. They said the incident unfolded just before 7 a.m. near the intersection of Canal Street and Wayside Drive. An ICE spokesperson said officers were trying to pull over a vehicle as part of a "targeted enforcement ope

entry.title: /int/ International: >Crocodilians and birds are closely related, they are the only living survivors …
entry.content: >Crocodilians and birds are closely related, they are the only living survivors of Archosauria, a group of reptiles that also includes dinosaurs and pterosaurs. In fact, crocodilians are the closest living relatives of modern birds, and they are more closely related to birds than they are to lizards or snakes.

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: First trailer for CHARLIE HARPER aka “Marriage Story for zoomers”
entry.content: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=3Ew APmmNBU4 >Following a whirlwind romance, Charlie (Nick Robinson) and Harper (Emilia Jones) leave their old lives behind to live together in a new town, where their relationship is strained by professional and personal struggles. Word is the movie begins with them already broken up and has a Rashomon-like structure exploring how each of them remembers their relationship differently.
